title: Hiring Production Engineer at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Himalaya Drug Company Global Group:
Himalaya Drug Company Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company Global Group!
